name: ZCCM Investment Holdings Plc
description: ZCCM-IH is a state-owned investment holding company listed on the Lusaka Securities Exchange, London Stock Exchange, and Euronext. It holds strategic stakes in Zambia's mining and energy sector companies.

name: Mopani Copper Mines Plc
description: Mopani Copper Mines operates the Mufulira and Nkana copper mines on the Copperbelt. ZCCM-IH holds 49% stake following the 2024 IRH/Delta Mining acquisition of 51%.

name: Konkola Copper Mines Plc
description: Konkola Copper Mines is 100% owned by ZCCM-IH following government reacquisition. KCM operates the Konkola Deep Mine, Nchanga open pit, and Nchanga underground mines in Chingola.

name: Copperbelt Energy Corporation Plc
description: CEC is a private power utility supplying electricity to Copperbelt mining companies. ZCCM-IH holds a 20% strategic stake. CEC is listed on the Lusaka Securities Exchange.

name: NFC Africa Mining Plc
description: NFC Africa Mining operates the Chambishi copper mine in Luanshya. ZCCM-IH holds a 15% stake. The majority shareholder is China Nonferrous Metal Mining Group.

name: Lubambe Copper Mine Ltd
description: Lubambe Copper Mine is located in Chililabombwe on the Copperbelt. ZCCM-IH holds a 20% stake. The mine focuses on underground copper extraction.

name: Maamba Collieries Ltd
description: Maamba Collieries operates Zambia's largest coal mine and a 300MW thermal power plant in Sinazongwe District. ZCCM-IH holds a 35% stake.

name: Ndola Lime Company Ltd
description: Ndola Lime Company is 100% owned by ZCCM-IH and produces lime for the mining industry. It is a critical supplier to Copperbelt mining operations.
